rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into implementation scope when binding to implementation-specific outputs or subcomponent connections.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL structure by placing contracts in the scope that matches the visibility of referenced features.
Ensure AGREE expressions reference only visible ports, constants, or explicitly declared variables — not AADL properties.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes must be wrapped in annex agree {** ... **};
Use eq declarations to define boolean range conditions before referencing them in guarantees.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL property names (e.g., Period, Deadline) as if they are AGREE variables.
Avoid using subcomponent paths in component type annexes — they are not visible at that scope.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE annex placement for requirements without implementation context
